expectations.text: Provides exactly three subject line options
expectations.evidence: Response provides exactly three subject lines labeled 1, 2, and 3.

expectations.text: Each option takes a genuinely distinct angle and is labeled by angle (e.g. curiosity / benefit+offer / urgency)
expectations.evidence: Options are labeled 'Urgency/scarcity', 'Curiosity/pattern interrupt', and 'Direct benefit' — each a distinct angle.

expectations.text: Each subject line is under ~50 characters
expectations.evidence: All three subject lines are under 50 characters: 'Your Black Friday coffee deal expires tonight' (45), 'We don't do Black Friday. (Except this year.)' (45), 'Black Friday: [X]% off every bag, all weekend' (45).

expectations.text: Does not fabricate specific discount figures; flags if a real discount % is needed
expectations.evidence: Uses '[X]%' placeholder and includes note: 'Replace [X]% with your actual discount — a specific number always outperforms a vague promise.'
